arts.ttl: Arsenal make Dusan Vlahovic swap offer
arts.sum: Arsenal are set to make a January swap offer for Dusan Vlahovic, which would see Gabriel Jesus move to Juventus as a makeweight in the deal. Jesus has fallen well down the pecking order with the Gunners, while Vlahovic continues to disappoint with his overall game in Turin.
